q1.question: How many numbers up to 100 (including it) exist such that when written officially in English, all letters will be lexicographically ordered?

q2.question: There is the only country whose official national flag is not four-cornered. What is the sum of internal angles of this flag's figure?
q2.explanation: Nepal's flag is unique in the world - it consists of two stacked triangles (a pentagon-like shape). Internal angles sum = (5 - 2) * 180 = 540*
